name: Carly Simon
abstract: Carly Elisabeth Simon (born June 25, 1943) is an American musician, singer, songwriter, and author. She rose to fame in the 1970s with a string of hit records; her 13 top 40 U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Ellen Rowe
about_quotes.evidence: Carole King, Carly Simon, James Taylor, Elton John — you know the first thing I figured out how to play on the piano, a kind of a pop tune, was “Your Song” by Elton John.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellen Rowe interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 2, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Bernie Kirsh
about_quotes.evidence: And there would be Carly Simon opening for Kris Kristofferson, you know it was that era, but major acts.
